answer_en:
Neck of Fibula
The common fibular n. (common peroneal n.) wraps around the neck of the fibula so any fractures of the fibular neck can cause nerve palsy

details: The common fibular n. (common peroneal n.) wraps around the neck of the fibula so any fractures of the fibular neck can cause nerve palsy
